hypothesis: The source7 byte-phase tag is generated and acknowledged on the live DFII write-data CSR path even though source7 is absent from readback.

field_repurpose.dfii_addr_nonzero_masks: source7 live write-side nonzero byte-slot mask
field_repurpose.dfii_addr_match_masks: source7 live write-side source7-tag byte-slot mask

decision.result: The source7 tag is generated and all source7 write-data CSR words are acknowledged, but source7 remains absent from the readback matrix.
decision.boundary: The fault is downstream of acknowledged DFII write-data CSR issuance.
decision.next_gate: Expose actual DFI/PHY write-data at the write command boundary, or force the source7 tag through a known-good source slot to determine whether disappearance follows the tag value or write-side byte slot.
